name: plannotator
description: Pi review and annotation surfaces for Plannotator
author: backnotprop

scripts.build:pi: bun run build:review && bun run build:annotation && bun run --cwd apps/pi-extension build
scripts.typecheck: bash apps/pi-extension/vendor.sh && tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ai/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/pi-extension/tsconfig.json
